reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 2 triggered: The attack path critically depends on an admin holding ASSET_ADMIN_ROLE adding many assets to the allowlist via applyAllowlistedAssetUpdates. Trust lookup against trust_assumptions.admin_roles yields trust_level=TRUSTED and in_scope_for_bug_bounty=false; no untrusted actor can add assets to the allowlist. Per conditional_scope.automation_infrastructure, automation triggering logic (checkUpkeep/performUpkeep) is also explicitly noted as out of scope, reinforcing the Gate 2 disposition.
